# Muhammad Ali Review Room

> Private review room for Jerry + agents.
> Current grade: strong enough for preliminary diligence.
> Main blocker: predecessor chain Ali -> Jaggi -> Grohe remains thinner than the rest of the package.

- [Review Console](index.html)

- [Supplemental Index JSON](documents/supplemental/index.json)

## Review Paths

- ring-first pass: Earth / Foundation & Control, Water / Market Form & Entry, Fire / Execution & Activation, Wind / External Field & Intelligence, Void / Long-Horizon Strategy
- top-layer pass: verdict, strategic comparison, state feed, logic chain
- evidence pass: signal-first library, Circle 1, Circle 2, appendix, selected commercial note
- commercialization update: Project TKO - WIP Discussion Document - 20260402.pdf is a draft model document for subscriber-lift, SVOD/AVOD framing, and buyer-side valuation inputs
- comparative valuation support: World with AI Fair Price Assessment is a scenario comparator for pricing and contingent consideration, not direct Ali proof
- counsel path: legal-anchor/index.html, control memo, document status table, signed assignment evidence appendix

## Feedback

- Human feedback channel: [a.w@apollon-holding.net](mailto:a.w@apollon-holding.net)
- Prompt for reviewers: how it felt, what looked credible or weak, and what should be done better while evaluation is still live

## Room Facts

- Indexed documents: 85
- Supplemental review items: 20
- Canonical: 67
- Duplicates: 11
- Archive: 5
- Need review: 1
- Remove: 1

## Legal Status

- Grohe -> Walter: operative agreement plus payment proof and Swiss-law memo support
- Walter -> Apollon: signed-but-needs-verification
- Not yet: insurer-grade, distributor-grade, or closing-grade

## Strategic Path Status

- Current recommendation: pursue_with_conditions
- Applies to: high_optimization_path
- Why: the Saudi ecosystem path outperforms the baseline path on long-horizon value, but still depends on title hardening, explicit governance, and transparent go-to-market design
